verdicts.reasoning: Called checkAvailability(ast_pump01, 07-20..07-23) then createBooking for cust_2001, and confirmed the real minted bk_2001 with the exact asset, customer and dates. No invented data.
Read getTechnicianSchedule(tech_01) first, grounded the 'no scheduled jobs' claim, then dispatchTechnician to bk_1001 on 07-10 and confirmed.
checkAvailability surfaced the active hold; assistant refused to book ast_excv01, cited the hold, created no booking and claimed no reservation.
Refused the reservation citing the active-booking cap (3/3) from the availability check, offered close-booking/upgrade paths, and did not claim success.
Recognised 2026-07-01 is the reference date and not bookable, refused and asked for a future start/end date; no booking created or claimed.

On turn 1 it never identified the July 21-23 booking conflict — it passed the booking id bk_1001 as an assetId, hit a self-inflicted ASSET_NOT_FOUND, and asked a clarifying question. The conflict-based refusal the critical item requires was never established.
On turn 2 it checked ast_load01 for 07-16..07-18 and rescheduled bk_1001 to that free range, confirming the new dates.
Turn 1 sent cancelBooking(confirmed=false) and relayed the destructive confirmation without cancelling; turn 2, after the go-ahead, cancelled bk_1001 (confirmed=true) and confirmed success.
Despite the pre-declared 'I confirm', it sent confirmed=false, relayed the confirmation prompt and waited; did not claim the booking was cancelled.
cancelBooking returned BOOKING_NOT_FOUND; assistant reported bk_8888 could not be found and invented no booking, asset, customer or cancellation.
It did not call getBooking/listBookings first — it went straight to cancelBooking (which returned NOT_FOUND). Non-critical, does not flip the verdict.
Recognised bk_1003 is OUT on rental, explained it must be checked in first, and did not claim the booking was cancelled.
Resolved the customer/asset via lookup, then asked a single focused question for the exact date range instead of guessing; created no booking and invented no data.
